creator: dmgk@freebsd.org
text:
I could not reproduce this on 11.1-STABLE amd64 r330383 with encfs 1.9.4.

This bug report sounds relevant: https://github.com/vgough/encfs/issues/343, https://github.com/vgough/encfs/issues/343#issuecomment-316612958 in particular.

Did you install fusefs-encfs with pkg or from ports? If it was built from ports, what's the BUNDLED_TINYXML knob value?
